title: Tighten SwipeCarouselSection spacing and add animated right-arrow indicator

requirements.text: In `frontend/src/components/landing/SwipeCarouselSection.tsx`, slightly reduce the vertical spacing between the carousel image block and the carousel text block, while keeping the existing mobile-first vertical flow (image on top, text below) and keeping all carousel copy unchanged.

quotes: Can you slightly reduce spacing between carousel image and its text

acceptanceCriteria: On mobile and desktop, the gap between the slide image and the start of the text block is visibly smaller than before, without causing overlap/clipping.
The slide image remains fully visible (non-cropped) and keeps `object-fit: contain` behavior.
No carousel text in `frontend/src/content/tbnCopy.ts` is modified (wording, emojis, line breaks, and which slides have bullets remain exactly the same).

requirements.text: In `frontend/src/components/landing/SwipeCarouselSection.tsx`, slightly reduce line spacing (leading) within the carousel text block (title/description/bullets/tagline) so the text reads tighter, while preserving readability and keeping all carousel copy unchanged.

quotes: And slightly reduce spacing between lines in carousel text

acceptanceCriteria: Line spacing within the description and bullet lines is slightly tighter than before (reduced leading), but remains readable on mobile and desktop.
Spacing reduction does not cause text to collide with bullets, markers, or other UI elements.
No changes are made to the actual carousel copy content in `frontend/src/content/tbnCopy.ts`.

requirements.text: Add an animated arrow indicator on the right side of the carousel area in `frontend/src/components/landing/SwipeCarouselSection.tsx` to hint users can swipe/scroll to the next slide; the indicator must be visually subtle, consistent with the black + gold theme, and must not overlap slide content or the existing navigation controls.

quotes: Also add a animated arrow on right indicating carousel

acceptanceCriteria: A right-side arrow indicator is visible within the carousel section and has a continuous subtle animation (e.g., gentle nudge/pulse) to suggest horizontal movement.
The arrow does not block/cover the slide image, slide text, pagination dots, or prev/next buttons on common mobile and desktop breakpoints.
The arrow is non-interactive (does not capture clicks/drags intended for the carousel) and does not introduce horizontal page overflow/scrolling.
The arrow indicator uses accessible markup (decorative arrow is `aria-hidden` or otherwise does not create confusing screen reader output).

constraints: Do not change any carousel copy/wording; keep all text exactly as it currently exists in `frontend/src/content/tbnCopy.ts` (including emojis and line breaks).
Do not introduce any layout that causes horizontal scrolling of the overall page (keep root overflow-x hidden behavior intact).
Do not edit frontend immutable paths listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT (compose existing UI components rather than modifying them).
nonGoals: Do not change carousel behavior (auto-advance timing, swipe/drag thresholds, or navigation logic) beyond what is necessary to place the arrow indicator safely.
Do not add new backend functionality or modify Motoko canister code.
